324:     )} && python3 - <<'PY'\n# nimbus_detect_secrets\nimport json\nimport os\nimport re\n\npattern = re.compile(r'(^|/)(\\.env(\\.|$)|id_rsa|id_dsa|.*\\.pem$|.*\\.p12$|.*\\.key$)', re.IGNORECASE)\nallowed_env_templates = re.compile(r'(^|/)\\.env\\.(example|sample|template|dist|defaults)(\\.|$)', re.IGNORECASE)\nexcluded_dirs = {'.git', 'node_modules', '.next', '.nuxt', '.svelte-kit', '.turbo', '.cache', 'dist', 'build', 'coverage', 'target'}\nroot = os.getcwd()\nmatches = []\nfor dirpath, dirnames, filenames in os.walk(root):\n    rel_dir = os.path.relpath(dirpath, root)\n    if rel_dir == '.':\n        rel_dir = ''\n    if rel_dir and any(part in excluded_dirs for part in rel_dir.split(os.sep)):\n        continue\n    dirnames[:] = [d for d in dirnames if d not in excluded_dirs]\n    for name in filenames:\n        absolute = os.path.join(dirpath, name)\n        rel = os.path.relpath(absolute, root).replace('\\\\', '/')\n        if allowed_env_templates.search(rel):\n            continue\n        if pattern.search(rel):\n            matches.append(rel)\nprint(json.dumps(matches[:25]))\nPY`
325:   );
326: 
327:   const parsed = JSON.parse(output) as unknown;
328:   if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) {
329:     return [];
330:   }
331: 
332:   return parsed.filter((item): item is string => typeof item === 'string').slice(0, 25);
333: }

335: async function createDeploymentBundle(
336:   sandbox: SandboxClient
337: ): Promise<{ bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string; objectKeySuffix: string }> {
338:   const base64 = await runSandboxCommand(
339:     sandbox,
340:     `cd ${shellQuote(
341:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
342:     )} && tmp_stem=$(mktemp /tmp/nimbus-workspace-deploy.XXXXXX) && tmp_bundle="\${tmp_stem}.tar.gz" && tar -czf "$tmp_bundle" --exclude='.git' . && base64 "$tmp_bundle" && rm -f "$tmp_bundle" "$tmp_stem"`,
343:     { timeout: 8 * 60 * 1000 }
344:   );
345:   const bytes = fromBase64(base64);
346:   const sha = await sha256Hex(bytes);
347:   return {
348:     bytes,
349:     sha256: sha,
350:     objectKeySuffix: 'source.tar.gz',
351:   };
352: }

354: async function createDependencyCacheArchive(
355:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
356:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile
357: ): Promise<{ bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string } | null> {
358:   const projectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(profile.projectRoot);
359:   const nodeModules = projectRoot === '.' ? 'node_modules' : `${projectRoot}/node_modules`;
360:   const result = await sandbox.exec(
361:     `cd ${shellQuote(
362:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
363:     )} && if [ ! -d ${shellQuote(
364:       nodeModules
365:     )} ]; then echo '{}'; else tmp_stem=$(mktemp /tmp/nimbus-workspace-cache.XXXXXX) && tmp_bundle="${'$'}{tmp_stem}.tar.gz" && tar -czf "${'$'}tmp_bundle" ${shellQuote(
366:       nodeModules
367:     )} && base64 "${'$'}tmp_bundle" && rm -f "${'$'}tmp_bundle" "${'$'}tmp_stem"; fi`,
368:     { timeout: 5 * 60 * 1000 }
369:   );
370:   if (result.exitCode !== 0) {
371:     return null;
372:   }
373:   const output = result.stdout.trim();
374:   if (!output || output === '{}') {
375:     return null;
376:   }
377:   const bytes = fromBase64(output);
378:   return {
379:     bytes,
380:     sha256: await sha256Hex(bytes),
381:   };
382: }
383: 
384: async function restoreDependencyCacheArchive(
385:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
386:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile,
387:   bytes: Uint8Array
388: ): Promise<void> {
389:   const projectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(profile.projectRoot);
390:   const payload = toBase64(bytes);
391:   const command =
392:     `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && mkdir -p ${shellQuote(projectRoot)} && python3 - <<'PY'\n` +
393:     `import base64\n` +
394:     `import subprocess\n` +
395:     `payload = ${JSON.stringify(payload)}\n` +
396:     `raw = base64.b64decode(payload.encode('ascii'))\n` +
397:     `proc = subprocess.run(['tar', '-xzf', '-', '-C', '.'], input=raw)\n` +
398:     `raise SystemExit(proc.returncode)\n` +
399:     `PY`;
400:   const result = await sandbox.exec(command, { timeout: 5 * 60 * 1000 });
401:   if (result.exitCode !== 0) {
402:     const combined = [result.stdout, result.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
403:     throw new Error(combined || 'Failed to restore dependency cache archive');
404:   }
405: }

443: ): Promise<void> {
444:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
445:   if (!deployment) {
446:     return;

448: 
449:   if (deployment.status === 'succeeded') {
450:     const hasSucceededEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
451:       env.DB,

453:       deploymentId,
454:       'deployment_succeeded'

456:     if (!hasSucceededEvent) {

462:           deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,

466:       });
467:     }

469:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
470:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
471:       status: 'succeeded',
472:       deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
473:       deployedAt: deployment.finishedAt,
474:       errorCode: null,
475:       errorMessage: null,
476:     });
477:     return;
478:   }

480:   if (deployment.status === 'failed') {
481:     const hasFailedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'deployment_failed');
482:     if (!hasFailedEvent) {
483:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
484:         workspaceId,
485:         deploymentId,
486:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',

490:         },
491:       });
492:     }
493: 
494:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
495:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
496:       status: 'failed',
497:       errorCode: deployment.error?.code ?? null,
498:       errorMessage: deployment.error?.message ?? null,
499:     });
500:     return;
501:   }
502: 
503:   if (deployment.status === 'cancelled') {
504:     const hasCancelledEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
505:       env.DB,
506:       workspaceId,
507:       deploymentId,
508:       'deployment_cancelled'

513:         deploymentId,

516:       });

518: 
519:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
520:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
521:       status: 'cancelled',

523:       errorMessage: null,

554: function isRunningDeploymentStale(startedAt: string | null): boolean {
555:   if (!startedAt) {
556:     return false;
557:   }
558: 
559:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
560:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
561:     return false;
562:   }
563: 
564:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
565: }

574: async function executeWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
575:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
576:   if (!deployment) {
577:     return;
578:   }
579:   const payload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
580:   if (!payload) {
581:     throw new PolicyError('deployment_not_found', 'Deployment payload no longer exists');
582:   }
583: 
584:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
585:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
586:     throw new PolicyError('workspace_not_ready', 'Workspace is not ready for deployment');
587:   }
588: 
589:   const validation =
590:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
591:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
592:       : {};
593:   const autoFix =
594:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
595:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
596:       : {};
597:   const cache =
598:     payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
599:       ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
600:       : {};
601:   const requestedToolchain =
602:     payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
603:       ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
604:       : null;
605:   const validationOptions: DeploymentValidationOptions = {
606:     runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
607:     runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
608:   };
609:   const autoFixOptions: DeploymentAutoFixOptions = {
610:     rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
611:     bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
612:   };
613:   const cacheOptions: DeploymentCacheOptions = {
614:     dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
615:   };
616:   const { runBuildIfPresent, runTestsIfPresent } = validationOptions;
617:   const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true);
618:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
619: 
620:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
621:   try {
622:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
623:   } catch (error) {
624:     if (!(error instanceof PolicyError) || error.code !== 'baseline_missing') {
625:       throw error;
626:     }
627: 
628:     if (!autoFixOptions.rehydrateBaseline) {
629:       throw error;
630:     }
631: 
632:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
633:       workspaceId,
634:       deploymentId,
635:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_attempted',
636:       payload: {},
637:     });
638: 
639:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
640:     if (!rehydrated) {
641:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
642:         workspaceId,
643:         deploymentId,
644:         eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_failed',
645:         payload: {},
646:       });
647:       throw new PolicyError('baseline_rehydrate_failed', 'Workspace git baseline is missing and could not be rehydrated');
648:     }
649: 
650:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
651:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
652:       workspaceId,
653:       deploymentId,
654:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_succeeded',
655:       payload: {},
656:     });
657:   }
658: 
659:   const provenance =
660:     payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
661:       ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
662:       : {};
663:   const taskId = typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' ? provenance.taskId : null;
664:   const operationId = typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' ? provenance.operationId : null;
665:   if (taskId) {
666:     const task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
667:     if (!task) {
668:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_task', 'Referenced taskId does not belong to workspace');
669:     }
670:   }
671:   if (operationId) {
672:     const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
673:     if (!operation) {
674:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_operation', 'Referenced operationId does not belong to workspace');
675:     }
676:   }
677: 
678:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
679:     workspaceId,
680:     deploymentId,
681:     eventType: 'deployment_started',
682:     payload: {
683:       provider: deployment.provider,
684:       attemptCount: deployment.attemptCount,
685:       runBuildIfPresent,
686:       runTestsIfPresent,
687:       autoFix: autoFixOptions,
688:       cache: cacheOptions,
689:     },
690:   });
691: 
692:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
693: 
694:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
695:   try {
696:     toolchain = applyRequestedToolchainOverride(
697:       await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
698:         sandbox,
699:         typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim()
700:           ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot
701:           : '.'
702:       ),
703:       requestedToolchain
704:     );
705:   } catch (error) {
706:     throw new PolicyError('toolchain_detect_failed', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
707:   }
708: 
709:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
710:     workspaceId,
711:     deploymentId,
712:     eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_detected',
713:     payload: toolchain,
714:   });
715: 
716:   if (toolchain.manager === 'unknown') {
717:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
718:       workspaceId,
719:       deploymentId,
720:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_unknown_fallback',
721:       payload: { fallbackManager: 'npm' },
722:     });
723:   }
724: 
725:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
726:     workspaceId,
727:     toolchain,
728:     remediations,
729:   });
730: 
731:   const scripts = await detectPackageScripts(sandbox);
732:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
733:     (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) || (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild);
734: 
735:   if (autoFixOptions.bootstrapToolchain && shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
736:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
737:       workspaceId,
738:       deploymentId,
739:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_started',
740:       payload: {
741:         manager: toolchain.manager,
742:         version: toolchain.version,
743:       },
744:     });
745:     try {
746:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
747:       if (toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn') {
748:         remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: true });
749:       }
750:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
751:         workspaceId,
752:         deploymentId,
753:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
754:         payload: { manager: toolchain.manager },
755:       });
756:     } catch (error) {
757:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
758:         workspaceId,
759:         deploymentId,
760:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_failed',
761:         payload: {
762:           manager: toolchain.manager,
763:           message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
764:         },
765:       });
766:       throw error;
767:     }
768:   } else {
769:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
770:       workspaceId,
771:       deploymentId,
772:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
773:       payload: { manager: toolchain.manager, skipped: true },
774:     });
775:   }
776:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
777: 
778:   const potentialSecrets = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
779:   if (potentialSecrets.length > 0) {
780:     throw new PolicyError(
781:       'potential_secrets_detected',
782:       `Potential secrets detected in workspace files: ${potentialSecrets.join(', ')}`
783:     );
784:   }
785: 
786:   const dependencyCacheKey = cacheOptions.dependencyCache ? await makeDependencyCacheKey(workspaceId, toolchain) : null;
787:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
788:     workspaceId,
789:     toolchain,
790:     dependencyCacheKey,
791:     dependencyCacheHit: false,
792:     remediations,
793:   });
794: 
795:   if (cacheOptions.dependencyCache && dependencyCacheKey) {
796:     const existingCache = await getWorkspaceDependencyCache(env.DB, workspaceId, dependencyCacheKey);
797:     if (!existingCache) {
798:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
799:         workspaceId,
800:         deploymentId,
801:         eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_miss',
802:         payload: { dependencyCacheKey },
803:       });
804:     } else {
805:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
806:         workspaceId,
807:         deploymentId,
808:         eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_hit',
809:         payload: { dependencyCacheKey, artifactKey: existingCache.artifactKey },
810:       });
811:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
812:         workspaceId,
813:         dependencyCacheHit: true,
814:       });
815:       try {
816:         const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
817:         const object = bucket ? await bucket.get(existingCache.artifactKey) : null;
818:         if (!object) {
819:           throw new Error('Dependency cache artifact is unavailable');
820:         }
821:         const bytes = new Uint8Array(await object.arrayBuffer());
822:         await restoreDependencyCacheArchive(sandbox, toolchain, bytes);
823:       } catch (error) {
824:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
825:           workspaceId,
826:           deploymentId,
827:           eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_restore_failed',
828:           payload: {
829:             dependencyCacheKey,
830:             message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
831:           },
832:         });
833:       }
834:     }
835:   }
836: 
837:   if (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) {
838:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
839:       workspaceId,
840:       deploymentId,
841:       eventType: 'validation_started',
842:       payload: { step: 'test' },
843:     });
844:     try {
845:       await runValidationStep(
846:         sandbox,
847:         `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && ${managerRunScriptCommand(toolchain, 'test')}`,
848:         10 * 60 * 1000,
849:         'validation_tool_missing'
850:       );
851:     } catch (error) {
852:       if (error instanceof PolicyError && error.code === 'validation_tool_missing') {
853:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
854:           workspaceId,
855:           deploymentId,
856:           eventType: 'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
857:           payload: { step: 'test', message: error.message },
858:         });
859:       }
860:       throw error;
861:     }
862:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
863:   }
864:   if (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) {
865:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
866:       workspaceId,
867:       deploymentId,
868:       eventType: 'validation_started',
869:       payload: { step: 'build' },
870:     });
871:     try {
872:       await runValidationStep(
873:         sandbox,
874:         `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && ${managerRunScriptCommand(toolchain, 'build')}`,
875:         10 * 60 * 1000,
876:         'validation_tool_missing'
877:       );
878:     } catch (error) {
879:       if (error instanceof PolicyError && error.code === 'validation_tool_missing') {
880:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
881:           workspaceId,
882:           deploymentId,
883:           eventType: 'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
884:           payload: { step: 'build', message: error.message },
885:         });
886:       }
887:       throw error;
888:     }
889:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
890:   }
891: 
892:   if (cacheOptions.dependencyCache && dependencyCacheKey) {
893:     const archive = await createDependencyCacheArchive(sandbox, toolchain);
894:     if (archive) {
895:       const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
896:       if (bucket) {
897:         const artifactKey = `workspaces/${workspaceId}/dependency-caches/${dependencyCacheKey}.tar.gz`;
898:         await bucket.put(artifactKey, archive.bytes, {
899:           httpMetadata: { contentType: 'application/gzip' },
900:           customMetadata: {
901:             workspace_id: workspaceId,
902:             cache_key: dependencyCacheKey,
903:             manager: toolchain.manager,
904:           },
905:         });
906:         await upsertWorkspaceDependencyCache(env.DB, {
907:           id: `wdc_${dependencyCacheKey.slice(0, 24)}`,
908:           workspaceId,
909:           cacheKey: dependencyCacheKey,
910:           manager: toolchain.manager,
911:           managerVersion: toolchain.version,
912:           projectRoot: toolchain.projectRoot,
913:           lockfileName: toolchain.lockfile?.name ?? null,
914:           lockfileSha256: toolchain.lockfile?.sha256 ?? null,
915:           artifactKey,
916:           artifactSha256: archive.sha256,
917:           artifactBytes: archive.bytes.byteLength,
918:         });
919:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
920:           workspaceId,
921:           deploymentId,
922:           eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_saved',
923:           payload: {
924:             dependencyCacheKey,

parts.text:
Found two issues worth fixing before merge:

- High: dependency-cache restore can fail for realistic cache sizes because the whole tarball is inlined into the shell command as base64 (`payload = "...huge..."`) in `restoreDependencyCacheArchive`. That can exceed command-length limits and crash restore even when the cache object is valid. See `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:390`.
- Medium: deployment state marks cache hit before restore actually succeeds (`dependencyCacheHit: true` is written, then restore is attempted, and on failure it only emits an event). This will report false-positive cache-hit telemetry and could mislead retry/debug logic. See `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:811` and `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:824`.

I ran both test suites (`packages/cli` and `packages/worker`), and they pass; these issues are runtime/behavioral edge cases not covered by current tests.
